creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
How to visit Japan without leaving NYC 

How to get there: Take the N, R, or D train🚆 from Manhattan to 36th Street in Brooklyn. Walk 1 block west and you’ll end up at Industry City which is home to Japan Village🇯🇵

#nyc #NewYork #travel #japan #nybucketlist

transcription.text: I'm in New York and I'm really craving a trip to Japan, but I don't have the time for it, so I'm gonna do the next best thing. You'll take the N train from Manhattan and get out at 36th Street in Brooklyn. Walk one block west until you see this giant warehouse. Go inside and you'll find yourself in this massive food hall with all kinds of delicious Japanese foods, a Japanese supermarket, a giant courtyard with all kinds of Japanese restaurants and bars. But if you go just one floor up, you'll find a bunch of anime stores with collector items, games, activities, and cool stuff you won't easily find in America. This is Japan Village in Industry City, Brooklyn.
